_metadata.source: EU CBAM Regulation (EU) 2023/956 - Annex I (as amended by Omnibus Simplification Oct 2025)
_metadata.disclaimer: Complete CBAM Annex I CN codes covering all six product groups. For actual filings, cross-reference with the latest EU Combined Nomenclature.

25070080.description: Kaolin and other kaolinic clays (for cement production)
25070080.notes: Kaolinic clays used as supplementary cementitious material

25231000.notes: Intermediate product; ~60-65% CaO content; highest emission intensity in cement sector

25232100.description: White Portland cement, whether or not artificially coloured
25232100.notes: Higher energy input due to purity requirements (+12% vs grey cement)

25232900.description: Portland cement, other than white (grey cement)
25232900.notes: Most common cement type globally; clinker ratio ~73%

25233000.notes: Calcium aluminate cement; used for refractory applications

25239000.notes: Includes slag cement, pozzolanic cement, composite cements; lower clinker ratio

25233010.notes: Low clinker content (~5%); mainly slag-based; low emission intensity

25239010.notes: Blended cement with limestone filler; medium clinker ratio

72011000.description: Non-alloy pig iron containing by weight 0.5% or less of phosphorus
72011000.notes: Blast furnace output; primary input to BOF steelmaking

72012000.description: Non-alloy pig iron containing by weight more than 0.5% of phosphorus
72012000.notes: High-phosphorus pig iron for foundry applications

72015000.notes: Specialty pig iron with manganese and other alloys

72021100.description: Ferro-manganese containing by weight more than 2% of carbon
72021100.notes: High-carbon ferro-manganese; electric arc or blast furnace route

72022100.description: Ferro-silicon containing by weight more than 55% of silicon

72023000.notes: Combined Si+Mn alloy; submerged arc furnace production

72024100.description: Ferro-chromium containing by weight more than 4% of carbon
72024100.notes: High-carbon ferro-chrome for stainless steel production

72071100.description: Semi-finished products of iron or non-alloy steel, rectangular cross-section, width >= 2x thickness

72081000.description: Flat-rolled products of iron or non-alloy steel, in coils, hot-rolled, with patterns in relief

72082500.description: Flat-rolled products of iron or non-alloy steel, hot-rolled, thickness >= 4.75mm

72091500.description: Flat-rolled products of iron or non-alloy steel, cold-rolled, thickness >= 3mm
72091500.notes: Cold-rolled; additional processing energy vs hot-rolled

72131000.description: Bars and rods, hot-rolled, of iron or non-alloy steel, containing indentations

72142000.description: Bars and rods of iron or non-alloy steel, with indentations, ribs, grooves

72163100.description: U sections of iron or non-alloy steel, hot-rolled, height >= 80mm

72171000.description: Wire of iron or non-alloy steel, not plated or coated

72193100.description: Flat-rolled products of stainless steel, cold-rolled, width >= 600mm, thickness >= 4.75mm
72193100.notes: Stainless steel plate; includes chromium-nickel alloy contribution

73041900.description: Tubes, pipes and hollow profiles, seamless, of iron or steel, other
73041900.notes: Seamless tubes; additional hot piercing and elongation energy

76011000.notes: Primary aluminium from Hall-Heroult smelting; global average including indirect

76012000.notes: Alloyed primary aluminium; minor alloy contribution

76020000.notes: Secondary aluminium; ~95% energy saving vs primary production

76041000.description: Aluminium bars, rods and profiles, not alloyed
76041000.notes: Extruded aluminium profiles; adds extrusion energy

76051100.description: Aluminium wire, not alloyed, maximum cross-sectional dimension > 7mm
76051100.notes: Aluminium wire rod; drawing and annealing energy

76061100.description: Aluminium plates, sheets and strip, not alloyed, rectangular, thickness > 0.2mm
76061100.notes: Rolled aluminium sheet; hot and cold rolling energy

76071100.description: Aluminium foil, not backed, rolled, thickness not exceeding 0.2mm
76071100.notes: Thin-gauge foil; very high rolling passes

76081000.description: Aluminium tubes and pipes, not alloyed

76109000.description: Aluminium structures and parts of structures, other

76161000.description: Aluminium nails, tacks, staples, screws, bolts
76161000.notes: Precision fasteners; high processing energy per unit mass

28080000.notes: Ammonia oxidation; includes N2O emissions (high GWP 265-298)

28141000.notes: Haber-Bosch process; natural gas feedstock + process heat

28142000.notes: Typically 25-30% NH3 concentration; lower EF per kg solution

31021000.description: Urea, whether or not in aqueous solution
31021000.notes: Most widely used nitrogen fertilizer globally; CO2 from ammonia process

31022100.notes: Nitrogen + sulphur fertilizer; by-product of caprolactam production

31023000.description: Ammonium nitrate, whether or not in aqueous solution
31023000.notes: High nitrogen content (34%N); process combines ammonia and nitric acid

31024000.description: Mixtures of ammonium nitrate with calcium carbonate or other inorganic non-fertilising substances
31024000.notes: CAN (27%N); diluted AN with limestone filler

31025000.notes: Chilean saltpeter; naturally occurring or synthetic

31026000.description: Double salts and mixtures of calcium nitrate and ammonium nitrate

31031100.description: Superphosphates containing by weight 35% or more of diphosphorus pentaoxide

31051000.description: Products of this chapter in tablets or similar forms or in packages of a gross weight not exceeding 10 kg
31051000.notes: Retail packaged fertilizers; weighted average EF

31052000.description: Mineral or chemical fertilisers containing nitrogen, phosphorus and potassium (NPK)
31052000.notes: NPK compound fertilizers; emission factor depends on N content

27160000.notes: Grid electricity; EF depends on exporting country grid mix. Excluded from de minimis threshold.

27160010.description: Electrical energy from renewable sources (with guarantees of origin)
27160010.notes: Renewable electricity with valid EU-compliant GO. Zero CBAM obligation if criteria met.

28041000.notes: Default for grey H2 (SMR without CCS). Excluded from de minimis threshold.

28042100.notes: Blue hydrogen; SMR + carbon capture; depends on capture rate (85-95%)

28042900.notes: Green hydrogen; PEM or alkaline electrolysis; near-zero if fully renewable

28044000.notes: Hydrogen transported as ammonia or LOHC; includes conversion losses
